taxonomy: Lyroglossa bicolor is classified within the family Orobanchaceae. This plant is further categorized as a species of parasitic flowering plant. It is part of the genus Lyroglossa, which is a group of flowering plants known for their parasitic nature. The family Orobanchaceae includes various species of flowering plants that are known to be parasitic or hemiparasitic. These plants obtain their nutrients by tapping into the vascular system of their host plants.
